true_header: Last man stands international non-disclosure agreement this agreement is made on  ____________________________________ (date) between 1. last man stands, (the "disclosing party"); and 2. _____________ , (the "receiving party"),
In consideration of the disclosure of proprietary information by the disclosing party,
Without granting any right or license,
Immediately upon the written request by the disclosing party at any time,
The receiving party further acknowledges and agrees that no representation or warranty,
Are referring to the letter of agreement between nmod and gi concerning industrial participation in further development of gripen and related projects (the "loa");
Noting their wish to exchange  information  for the  purpose of conducting evaluations  of the gripen aircraft,
Noting that such exchange  of information  may involve the disclosure  of confidential  information  by either  party,

Noting that exchanging  information with  gi shall also include exchanging information  with  saab and upon such disclosure  saab shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions  contained  herein as if saab was a party to the  nda;

Noting that  exchanging  information with the  nmod shall also include other  norwegian authorities  and upon such disclosure  said norwegian authority  shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions contained  herein as if said norwegian authority was a party to the  nda.

That it shall treat the confidential  information directly or indirectly disclosed to it by the  disclosing  party as strictly confidential  and will  not without obtaining  the  prior written  consent  of the  disclosing  party disclose  any part of the confidential  information to any third  party,
That it shall not make  use of any part of  the confidential information disclosed to it by the disclosing party,
That it shall give access to the  confidential  information only,
That it shall  not copy or reproduce  in any form  any of the confidential information  disclosed  to it by the  disclosing  party,
That it shall  keep a current  record of all copies and reproductions  of the confidential  information.
At the time of disclosure  or thereafter  available to the  public generally through  no failure  on the  part of the  receiving party;
Known to the  receiving party at the time of its disclosure;
Disclosed to the  receiving party by a third party having the  right to disclose confidential  information  and without  restrictions  as to use or disclosure;
Developed  independently  by the  receiving party without  use of or reference  to the confidential  information  received.
Critical energy infrastructure information non-disclosure agreement
Disclosure and use of confidential information.
Additional provisions relating to disclosure and use of ceii.
Return of documents and destruction of electronically stored information.
No representation or warranties.  with respect to any information,
Survival.  this agreement shall survive indefinitely and shall not be affected by the performance,
In this agreement, the following definitions shall apply:
Information  which  the  receiving  party  can  show  was  in  its  possession  on  a  non- confidential basis before receipt of the information from the disclosing party;
Information  which  is  lawfully  in  the  public  domain  at  the  time  of  the  receiving  party’s receipt  of  the  information  from  the  disclosing  party,
Responding to the company’s request for proposals for the project,
Assessing the contractor’s proposal, in the case of the company; and
Except  as  expressly  permitted  by  this  agreement,
Executed appendix a – permitted recipient’s acknowledgement; or
Are  bound  in  writing  by  confidentiality  terms,
The receiving party shall immediately notify the disclosing party, in writing,
This agreement is not intended to and does not obligate either party:
To disclose any specific confidential information; or
To enter into any subsequent business arrangements regarding the permitted purpose or any other matter.
This agreement does not create any exclusivity between the parties;
Term and return or destruction of confidential information
Return  to  the  disclosing  party  or  destroy  all  of  the  disclosing  party’s  original  tangible confidential information,

Safeguard  any  electronic  confidential  information  that  cannot  be  destroyed  due  to  the receiving party’s archiving practices or policies with the same degree of care as it would its own confidential information;
Retain  electronic  confidential  information  described  in  subsection  5.
Upon request of the disclosing party,
Each party shall pay its own costs and expenses incurred in connection with this agreement.
Should either party change its address while the agreement is in effect,
This agreement  is not  intended to and  does not grant,
To  the  extent  that  any  statute,
In this agreement, unless the context requires otherwise,
Any activities related to the assessment of any proposals for the project; and
Any related exchanges of information, clarifications, clearances, discussions, due diligence,
Hold the information in confidence and,
At the request and direction of the disclosing party, and without delay,
The obligations set out in clause 2 shall not apply to information that:
The receiving party can prove (using written or electronic records),
Co-operate with the disclosing party with respect to such matters,
The department of business, innovation and skills (or other relevant government department),
Constitutes an offer by or on behalf of the disclosing party; or
If any provision of this agreement is or becomes illegal,
This agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts,
